description: CompositionGrey polo T-shirt made of 57% cotton, 28% polyester and 15% viscose, has a spread collar, short sleeves with snipped cuffs, rugged buttoned chest placket, patch pocket on the left chest, graphic print at the back, branding printed on the left chest and vented hemline FitComfort Wash careMachine wash in warm water at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorations Stylish to the hilt, this T-shirt from spykar is a great addition to your wardrobe. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this fabulous tee, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and suede shoes to be the king of casual wear.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
